# Session Sunset Protocol: Agent-Level vs Swarm-Level Split

Refines the sunset protocol by introducing explicit scope declarations (`solo-refresh` vs `convergent`) to prevent token-refresh sunsets from triggering global swarm-level halts. Adds path-determinism rules (IF/ELSE-IF) and requires explicit scope declarations for the next 3 sunsets as a validation hook.
